item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-07-05 - Today's Summary
[sustained_hot] CoplayDev/unity-mcp (+424 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Unity MCP acts as a bridge between AI assistants and your Unity Editor. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +424，总 stars 11,793，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] alirezarezvani/claude-skills (+408 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: 337 Claude Code skills & agent skills & plugins (30+ Agents, 70+ custom commands, 330+ skills, customizable references, scripts)for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory, research, business operations, commercial & finance, and your daily productivity skills. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +408，总 stars 20,326，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Graphify-Labs/graphify (+717 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +717，总 stars 77,906，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Zackriya-Solutions/meetily (+1466 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1466，总 stars 15,901，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] immich-app/immich (+478 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: High performance self-hosted photo and video management solution. Why it matters: Other AI 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +478，总 stars 105,851，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] calesthio/OpenMontage (+884 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio. item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+1064 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees. item.title: [sudden_breakout] asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks (+1143 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +1143，前 3 日均值 285.7，加速度 4x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +20185，总 stars 56,913，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] headroomlabs-ai/headroom (+395 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
